debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : FunCont f
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hfa : f a < 0
hfb : 0 < f b
S : Set ℝ := {x | x ∈ Icc a b ∧ f x < 0}
a_in_S : a ∈ S
Snonempty : S.Nonempty
Sbounded : IsUB S b
c : ℝ
hc : IsLUB S c
a_le_c : a ≤ c
c_le_b : c ≤ b
fc_lt : ¬f c < 0
fc_gt : ¬0 < f c
fc : f c = 0
hc' : c ∈ Icc a b
hca : a ≠ c
hcb : b ≠ c
⊢ c < b

proof:
have : c ≠ b := by
    intro c_eq_b
    apply hcb
    symm
    exact c_eq_b
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this
failed_attempts:
have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this

have hb : c ≠ b := hcb
  have hle : c ≤ b := c_le_b
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm hb)

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  have hle : c ≤ b := c_le_b
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm this)

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b (Ne.symm this)

exact this
  have : c < b := lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b hcb
  exact this

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  have hlt : c < b := lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b (Ne.symm this)
  exact hlt

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b (Ne.symm this)

have : c ≠ b := hcb
    have : ¬ c = b := by exact this
    exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b (Ne.symm hcb)

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  linarith [c_le_b, this]

by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have : c = b := le_antisymm c_le_b h
  exact hcb this

have : c ≠ b := hcb
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b (Ne.symm this)
successful_attempts:
have : c ≠ b := by
    intro c_eq_b
    apply hcb
    symm
    exact c_eq_b
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne c_le_b this
